distribution_scheme.author: Reviewing Attorney
distribution_scheme.basis: testator wants specific cash and item bequests followed by an attorney-drafted residuary disposition; execution left undated for in-office signing

specific_bequests:
I give and bequeath the sum of Pat G. Public ($5,000) to the Jordan Q. Coe

I further give and bequeath my 1965 wristwatch to my friend, Noe D. Coe, if he survives me.
residuary_disposition: To my niece, Pat V. Moe, if she survives me; otherwise to her descendants who survive me, by right of representation (per stirpes).
personal_representative_name: Drew W. Moe, of Pat G. Roe, Maine
